arts.ttl: David Gray defends Hibs winger Elie Youan after pundit's 'unacceptable' verdict
arts.sum: My information went on very quickly as to what we wanted to do at the red card, especially for the next five minutes, to see what Dundee would do, to be honest, because of how well we started in the game. “I think anyone who knows Eli Youan knows he loves football,” the manager said.

The match here will have a huge say in the destiny of the title. Both sides are first and second and sit on 70 points, with Palmeiras leading on Brazil's tiebreaker of games won. Palmeiras come into...

arts.ttl: David de Gea is reborn and central to Fiorentina’s Serie A renaissance | Nicky Bandini
arts.sum: Goalkeeper is at heart of team reviving and defying expectations thanks to seven straight Serie A wins David de Gea said on day one that he wanted to “make history” with Fiorentina. Three months later, you could make a case he has already succeeded. The Viola won their seventh consecutive Serie A game on Sunday, 2-0 away to Como. Only once before – back in 1960 – have they achieved such a run in the Italian top-flight. The Spaniard has been essential. De Gea collected his fifth clean sheet against Como, more than any other goalkeeper has managed since he made his league debut on 15 September. He is having to work for them, too. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: The secret to a longer life, by David Beckham... and NASA!
arts.sum: At 49, Beckham remains an icon of health and fitness, credited to his disciplined training routine, balanced diet, and, as he now reveals, his long-time use of sports supplements. But now, Beckham is making headlines with the launch of his newest endeavor—a health and wellness brand called IM8, deeply connected to his personal philosophy of healthy living.

arts.ttl: David Moyes emerges as frontrunner to replace Steve Cooper at Leicester City
arts.sum: The veteran manager could be set for a return to management following Steve Cooper's sacking yesterday.

arts.ttl: David Gray is right that Hibs have seen this movie before and there is one way to stop things turning X rated
arts.sum: The rock bottom side are facing up to a battle to avoid the drop
